responses.source_text: a current carrying it farther
another feather crossing its path
a rising breath lifting it once more

lines: A rising breath lifts it once more.

responses.source_text: a still hand waiting beneath it

lines: A still hand waits beneath it.

responses.source_text: a flowing line gently embracing the opening circle

lines: A flowing line gently embraces the opening circle.

responses.source_text: the open edges beginning to curl into two playful waves
the two lines unfolding and dancing into an ever-growing spiral

lines: Its two lines unfold and dance

responses.source_text: a curved line gently drawing inward

lines: A curved line gently draws inward.

responses.source_text: a small boat turning toward the shore

lines: A small boat turns toward the shore.

responses.source_text: the returning water gathering into a lively wave
a line of shells shifting with the water

lines: A line of shells shifts with the water.

responses.source_text: a narrow stream flowing back toward the sea

lines: A narrow stream flows back toward the sea.

responses.source_text: two loosened lines beginning to open a new space
another thread slipping gently between the loosened strands
the loose strands beginning to form a new pattern
a hand gathering the threads without tightening them
another beam crossing it
the light climbing slowly up the wall

lines: The light climbs slowly up the wall.

responses.source_text: scattered autumn leaves beginning to shimmer in its path

lines: Scattered autumn leaves begin to shimmer

responses.source_text: a shadow moving alongside it
